records.question: Which activities named Square Dancing involve female assistant professors named Leslie Hall who work in room 288 of the Krieger building and have phone numbers at least 7332?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty ON faculty_participates_in.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE faculty.room = '288' AND faculty.building = 'Krieger' AND activity.activity_name = 'Square Dancing' AND faculty.fname = 'Leslie' AND faculty.rank = 'AsstProf' AND faculty.phone >= 7332 AND faculty.sex = 'F' AND faculty.lname = 'Hall'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.actid
FROM Activity a
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in fp ON a.actid = fp.actid
JOIN Faculty f ON fp.FacID = f.FacID
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Square Dancing'
  AND f.Fname = 'Leslie'
  AND f.Lname = 'Hall'
  AND f.Rank = 'Assistant Professor'
  AND f.Sex = 'F'
  AND f.Room = '288'
  AND f.Building = 'Krieger'
  AND f.Phone >= 7332

records.question: Which activities involve students advised by 1121 who are from the city where city_code is PIT?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.advisor = 1121 AND student.city_code = 'PIT'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.actid
FROM Activity a
JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid
JOIN Student s ON p.stuid = s.StuID
WHERE s.Advisor = 1121 AND s.city_code = 'PIT'

records.question: Which activities named exactly 'Football' have associated records in both participates_in and faculty_participates_in?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Football'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.actid
FROM Activity a
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Football'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Participates_in p WHERE p.actid = a.actid)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Faculty_Participates_in f WHERE f.actid = a.actid)

records.question: Which activities named Soccer involve female students named Sarah Schmidt who have a major of at least 50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.sex = 'F' AND student.fname = 'Sarah' AND activity.activity_name = 'Soccer' AND student.major >= 50 AND student.lname = 'Schmidt'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.actid
FROM Activity a
JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid
JOIN Student s ON p.stuid = s.StuID
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Soccer'
  AND s.Fname = 'Sarah'
  AND s.LName = 'Schmidt'
  AND s.Sex = 'F'
  AND s.Major >= 50

JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty ON faculty_participates_in.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE faculty.building = 'Krieger' AND faculty.lname = 'Goldman'

FROM Activity a
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in fp ON a.actid = fp.actid
JOIN Faculty f ON fp.FacID = f.FacID
